retry_reason: Failure is due to device errors, invalid parameters, or resource exhaustion; retrying the same call is unlikely to succeed without changing external conditions (e.g., freeing other resources).

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to allocate, initialize, and register a completion queue (CQ) with the RDMA device. The function performs extensive non-refcount logic: memory allocation, device callback invocation, completion handler setup, workqueue initialization, and resource tracking. The refcount operations (rdma_restrack_new/put) are only a minor part of the resource tracking infrastructure, not the main purpose.
judge.retry_reason: Failure is due to device errors, invalid parameters, or resource exhaustion; retrying the same call is unlikely to succeed without changing external conditions (e.g., freeing other resources).
